description.zh: Vane 是一款注重隐私的自托管 AI 搜索引擎，通过融合互联网知识与本地或云端大语言模型（如 Ollama、OpenAI、Claude）来回答问题，在保障用户数据完全私有前提下，提供带来源引用的准确答案。
description.en: Vane is a privacy-first, self-hosted AI search engine that answers questions by combining web knowledge with local or cloud-based LLMs (e.g., Ollama, OpenAI, Claude), delivering cited, accurate results without compromising user data.

feature.zh:
## 产品优势:

- 全隐私保障：所有搜索均在本地或用户自有基础设施中执行，无遥测、无查询日志。
- 灵活的 AI 后端：可无缝切换本地大模型与多种云服务商，灵活平衡成本、响应速度与答案质量。
- 可扩展架构：模块化设计便于轻松集成新搜索源、UI 小部件及智能体（agents）。

## 功能列表:

- 支持本地大语言模型（通过 Ollama）及云 AI 服务商（OpenAI、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、Groq）。
- 三种智能搜索模式：极速模式、均衡模式、高质量模式。
- 多源搜索：网页（基于 SearxNG）、论坛讨论、学术论文、图像、视频及上传文件（PDF、文本、图片）。
- 站点限定搜索：将查询限制在特定网站内（如技术文档站点）。
- 交互式 UI 小部件：天气、股价、计算器等上下文感知快捷信息卡片。
- 文件理解问答：支持上传文档并针对其内容提问，具备多模态理解能力。
- 实时搜索建议与本地持久化搜索历史。
- 可浏览的“发现”（Discover）信息流，推送当日热点与推荐内容。
- 提供 RESTful API，支持程序化调用搜索与模型编排。
feature.en:
## Benefits:

- Full privacy: All searches run locally or on your own infrastructure; no telemetry or query logging.
- Flexible AI backend: Seamlessly switch between local LLMs and multiple cloud providers for optimal cost, speed, and quality trade-offs.
- Extensible architecture: Modular design supports easy integration of new search sources, widgets, and agents.

## Features:

- Support for local LLMs (via Ollama) and cloud AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Groq).
- Three smart search modes: Speed, Balanced, and Quality.
- Multi-source search: Web (via SearxNG), discussions, academic papers, images, videos, and uploaded files (PDF, text, images).
- Domain-specific search: Restrict queries to particular websites (e.g., documentation sites).
- Interactive UI widgets: Weather, stock prices, calculations, and other contextual quick-lookups.
- File-aware Q&A: Ask questions about uploaded documents with multimodal understanding.
- Real-time search suggestions and local search history persistence.
- Browseable "Discover" feed for trending and recommended content.
- RESTful API for programmatic search and model orchestration.
